rule CDB_Synology_DiskStation_Manager_Vulnerabili {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Synology DiskStation Manager Vulnerability Allow Remote Attackers to Execute Arb"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "DiskStation" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2018-25210 - WebOfisi E-Ticaret 4.0 SQL Injection via ur"; content:"CVE-2018-25210"; nocase; sid:6797571; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4862 - UTT HiPER 1250GW Parameter formConfigDnsFilt"; content:"CVE-2026-4862"; nocase; sid:3364763; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
